channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Fan Lyu

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 (🔈New!) Zihan Ye, Fuyuan Hu, Fan Lyu, Linyan Li, Kaizhu Huang. Disentangling Semantic-to-visual Confusion for Zero-shot Learning[J]//EEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM), 2021. (Accepted) [paper][code] Fan Lyu, Shuai Wang, Wei Feng, Zihan Ye, Fuyuan Hu, Song Wang. Multi-domain Multi-task Rehearsal for Lifelong Learning[C]//In Proceedings of The Thirty-Fifth AAAI Conference on Artiﬁcial Intelligence (AAAI), 2021. [paper][code][slides] 2020 Chaorui Deng, Qi Wu, Qingyao Wu, Fan Lyu, Fuyuan Hu, Mingkui Tan.
